agent.name: QA Agent
agent.description: Agente de IA para Automacao de Testes

qa-agent.description: Ferramentas QA Agent: executar testes, testar APIs, gerenciar bugs e reports

customCommands.name: test:api
customCommands.command: python -c "from core.tools import run_api_test; import json; print(json.dumps(run_api_test(endpoint_name='{endpoint}'), indent=2))"

customCommands.name: qa:bugs
customCommands.command: python -c "from core.qa_tools import list_bugs; import json; print(json.dumps(list_bugs(status='open'), indent=2))"

customCommands.name: qa:report
customCommands.command: python -c "from core.qa_tools import generate_test_summary_report; import json; print(json.dumps(generate_test_summary_report(), indent=2))"

customCommands.name: app:start
customCommands.description: Inicia interface web Streamlit (precisa de chave API)

customCommands.name: app:setup
customCommands.description: Configura o ambiente (cria banco de dados demo)
